ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "asset_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the asset */,
  "asset_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the asset */,
  "asset_model" TEXT /* Model of the asset */,
  "asset_installation_date" TEXT /* Installation date of the asset */,
  "asset_maintenance_history" INTEGER /* Whether the asset has maintenance history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failure_modes" (
  "failure_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failure mode */,
  "failure_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the failure mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the failure mode */,
  "failure_mode_category" TEXT /* Category of the failure mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_failure_modes" (
  "asset_failure_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset-failure mode relationship */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "failure_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the failure mode */,
  "failure_date" TEXT /* Date of the failure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_failure_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_failure_modes_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_failure_modes_failure_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("failure_mode_id") REFERENCES failure_modes ("failure_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_activities" (
  "maintenance_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_maintenance_activities" (
  "asset_maintenance_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset-maintenance activity relationship */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "maintenance_activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_maintenance_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_maintenance_activities_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_maintenance_activities_maintenance_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_activity_id") REFERENCES maintenance_activities ("maintenance_activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost */,
  "maintenance_activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost_amount" REAL /* Amount of the cost */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the cost */,
  "cost_category" TEXT /* Category of the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_maintenance_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_activity_id") REFERENCES maintenance_activities ("maintenance_activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spare_parts" (
  "spare_part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spare part */,
  "spare_part_name" TEXT /* Name of the spare part */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "spare_part_description" TEXT /* Description of the spare part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spare_part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spare_parts_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "maintenance_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "maintenance_activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance activity */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance schedule */,
  "schedule_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the maintenance schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_maintenance_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_activity_id") REFERENCES maintenance_activities ("maintenance_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "failure_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the failure mode */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question related to the failure mode */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  "question_category" TEXT /* Category of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_failure_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("failure_mode_id") REFERENCES failure_modes ("failure_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "maintenance_schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance schedule */,
  "failure_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the failure mode */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_maintenance_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_schedule_id") REFERENCES maintenance_schedules ("maintenance_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_failure_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("failure_mode_id") REFERENCES failure_modes ("failure_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: ID of the project the asset belongs to
Whether the asset has maintenance history
Unique identifier for each failure mode
Unique identifier for each asset-failure mode relationship
Unique identifier for each maintenance activity
Unique identifier for each asset-maintenance activity relationship

Question related to the failure mode

Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship
